name: Analysis, Argument, and Real-World Problems
raw_prereq: sophomore standing or above and completion of at least one quarter of a university-level writing course.

name: Culture and Society in International Perspective
raw_prereq: completion of INTL 100 with a grade of C– or better.

name: Economics, Politics, and International Change
raw_prereq: completion of INTL 100 with a grade of C– or better.

name: Seminar in International Studies
raw_prereq: open to international studies majors only; successful completion with a C– or better of INTL 100, INTL 101, and 102.

name: Honors Seminar in International Studies
raw_prereq: international studies major with 3.5 major GPA; department application process required; senior standing; INTL 100; INTL 101; INTL 102.

name: International Studies Honors Program
raw_prereq: international studies major with 3.5 major GPA; department approval; senior standing; INTL 190H.

name: Internship
raw_prereq: department approval required; junior and senior standing.
